title: Intrinsic Effects of Exposome in Atopic Dermatitis: Genomics, Epigenomics and Regulatory Layers.
author: Grafanaki K Antonatos C Maniatis A Petropoulou A Vryzaki E Vasilopoulos Y Georgiou S Gregoriou S
content: S-EPMC10299550 PMC10299550 Intrinsic Effects of Exposome in Atopic Dermatitis: Genomics, Epigenomics and Regulatory Layers. Atopic dermatitis (AD) or atopic eczema is an increasingly manifested inflammatory skin disorder of complex etiology which is modulated by both extrinsic and intrinsic factors
